text_original:
I yoked my four white steeds, black-maned;
They hurried away with speed.
But did I not wish to return?
Therefore I make this song,
Announcing my wish to nourish my mother.
text_normalized:
I yoked my four white steeds, black-maned;
They hurried away with speed.
But did I not wish to return?
Therefore I make this song,
Announcing my wish to nourish my mother.
